behavioral_outcome_statement: parity_no_improvement: no behavioral improvement detected in bounded paired lane.

minimal_ally_or_foe_society.closure_note: Distinct runtime controller roles for pc_rat/scout_ally/sentry_foe/hunter_foe are emitted and linked to per-actor identity.

shared_social_memory.closure_note: tower_alarm_board and rat_scent_board carry replayable board state, source-mask semantics, and per-beat writer/decay deltas.

arbiter_balance_grading.closure_note: Fairness grading uses shipped 20.6 lane metrics, ally-usefulness delta, and non-omniscient coordinated-pressure scoring.
